system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

fluxScheme      Kurganov;

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(tauMC)      Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
    reconstruct(rho) vanLeer;
    reconstruct(U)  vanLeerV;
    reconstruct(T)  vanLeer;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "(rho|rhoU|rhoE)"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        nSweeps         2;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    e
    {
        $U;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         pureMixture;
    transport       const;
    thermo          hConst;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
    energy          sensibleInternalEnergy;
}

mixture
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight       28.96;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Cp              1004.5;
        Hf              0;
    }
    transport
    {
        mu              0;
        Pr              1;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='T', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      T;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 0 0 1 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

    version     2.0;

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (1.3 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            inletOutlet;
        inletValue      uniform (1.3 0 0);
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [1 -1 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;
        field           p;
        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;
        fieldInf        1;
        lInf            3;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     rhoCentralFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         4;

deltaT          0.002;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.1;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           0.5;

maxDeltaT       0.002;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Front face (z = -0.05)
    (0    0    -0.05)   // 0
    (0.6  0    -0.05)   // 1
    (0.6  0.2  -0.05)   // 2
    (0    0.2  -0.05)   // 3
    (3    0    -0.05)   // 4
    (3    0.2  -0.05)   // 5
    (0.6  1    -0.05)   // 6
    (3    1    -0.05)   // 7

    // Back face (z = 0.05)
    (0    0     0.05)   // 8
    (0.6  0     0.05)   // 9
    (0.6  0.2   0.05)   // 10
    (0    0.2   0.05)   // 11
    (3    0     0.05)   // 12
    (3    0.2   0.05)   // 13
    (0.6  1     0.05)   // 14
    (3    1     0.05)   // 15
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 3 2 1 4 7 6 5) (72 32 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
            (8 11 14 12)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (7 15 13 5)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type symmetryPlane;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
            (8 9 10 12)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type symmetryPlane;
        faces
        (
            (3 2 6 7)
            (11 10 14 15)
        );
    }
    obstacle
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (1 2 6 5)
            (9 10 13 5)
            (1 6 14 9)
            (2 3 7 6)
            (10 11 14 13)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>

<reviewer_analysis>## Error Diagnosis

Looking at the current error logs, the situation has evolved from previous attempts:

### Error 1: `log.blockMesh` — Face 1 in patch 0 does not have neighbour cell face

The error states:
```
face 1 in patch 0 does not have neighbour cell face: 4(8 11 14 12)
```

This means the face defined by vertices (8 11 14 12) on the `inlet` patch is a boundary face with no adjacent cell — it's a dangling/top-level face. Looking at the `blockMeshDict`, the `inlet` patch has two faces:
- `(0 3 7 4)` — connecting vertices 0, 3, 7, 4
- `(8 11 14 12)` — connecting vertices 8, 11, 14, 12

The first face `(0 3 7 4)` connects vertices from both the front and back faces of the block, which is geometrically incorrect because vertices 0, 3, 7, 4 are not co-planar — they form a quad that twists through space. Similarly, the `outlet` face `(7 15 13 5)` has the same issue.

The fundamental problem is that the vertex coordinates don't form valid hexahedral blocks. The vertices span from x=0 to x=3, but vertices 0,1,2,3 are all at x=0 or x=0.6, and vertices 4,5,6,7 are at x=3. This means the block tries to connect a small face (at x≈0) to a distant face (at x=3) with non-planar quads.

### Error 2: `log.rhoCentralFoam` — Cannot find points file

This is a cascading failure — since `blockMesh` failed, no mesh exists.

## Root Cause Analysis

The vertex positions create degenerate/invalid hexahedra. The front "face" (vertices 0,1,2,3) forms a rectangle at x=0 and y∈[0,0.2], z∈[-0.05,0.05]. The back "face" (vertices 4,5,6,7) forms a rectangle at x=3 and y∈[0,0.2], z∈[-0.05,0.05]. These are parallel rectangles separated by Δx=3. To form a valid hex block, the four side faces must each be planar quads. However, the sides connecting these faces involve vertices at different x-locations combined with y,z combinations that don't lie on a plane.

More critically, looking at the boundary face definitions, the `inlet` face `(0 3 7 4)` mixes vertices from the front face (0,3) with vertices from the back face (7,4) — but vertices 0 and 3 are at x=0 while 4 and 7 are at x=3, forming a valid quad. The same applies to `(8 11 14 12)`. The real issue is that the **vertex ordering on the boundary faces doesn't match the right-hand orientation of their respective hex block faces**.

## Resolution

**Fix `system/blockMeshDict`:**

1. **Reorder the vertices** so that the front face (z=-0.05) and back face (z=+0.05) are properly oriented. Change the vertex ordering to group by z-plane clearly:

   ```
   vertices
   (
       // Bottom-left-back  (0,0,-0.05)
       (0    0    -0.05)   // 0
       (0.6  0    -0.05)   // 1
       (0.6  0.2  -0.05)   // 2
       (0    0.2  -0.05)   // 3
       // Top-back
       (0    0     0.05)   // 4
       (0.6  0     0.05)   // 5
       (0.6  0.2   0.05)   // 6
       (0    0.2   0.05)   // 7
       // Bottom-front
       (3    0    -0.05)   // 8
       (3.6  0    -0.05)   // 9
       (3.6  0.2  -0.05)   // 10
       (3    0.2  -0.05)   // 11
       // Top-front
       (3    0     0.05)   // 12
       (3.6  0     0.05)   // 13
       (3.6  0.2   0.05)   // 14
       (3    0.2   0.05)   // 15
   );
   ```

2. **Define a single hex block** covering the full domain from x=0 to x=3.6 and y=0 to y=0.2:

   ```
   blocks
   (
       hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (72 32 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
   );
   ```

3. **Redefine all boundary patches** to match this new vertex layout. The `inlet` should be the face at x=0 (vertices 0,3,7,4), the `outlet` at x=3.6 (vertices 8,11,15,12), `bottom` at y=0 (faces 0,1,5,4 and 8,9,13,12), `top` at y=0.2 (faces 3,2,6,7 and 11,10,14,15), and the `obstacle` step region faces at x=0.6 (faces 1,2,6,5).

The key principle: **each hex block face must consist of four coplanar vertices**, and the boundary face definitions must pick vertex quadruples that are coplanar. The current vertex positions place vertices 0,1,2,3 at x=0/0.6 and vertices 4,5,6,7 at x=0/0.6 — making the front and back faces non-coplanar in x. By separating the domain into a proper rectangular prism from x=0 to x=3.6, all six faces of the hex block become valid planar quads.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Replace all 16 vertices with 8 vertices defining a proper rectangular prism: vertex 0=(0,0,-0.05), vertex 1=(0.6,0,-0.05), vertex 2=(0.6,0.2,-0.05), vertex 3=(0,0.2,-0.05), vertex 4=(0,0,0.05), vertex 5=(0.6,0,0.05), vertex 6=(0.6,0.2,0.05), vertex 7=(0,0.2,0.05). Replace the single hex block definition with: hex (0 3 2 1 4 7 6 5) (72 32 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1). Keep all boundary patch definitions unchanged as the face vertex orderings already reference correct coplanar vertex sets'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar, compressible flow over a forward-facing step using the rhoCentralFoam solver. Boundary conditions include a fixed velocity of 1.3m/s and temperature of 1 K at the inlet and slip conditions on the obstacle. Use timestep of 0.002 and output every 0.1. Finaltime is 4.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
